initiate_cycle_visit.description: initiate an oncology cycle visit A
preconditions: I can only initiate an oncology cycle visit A if it is not the case that the visit A is initialized and it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I initiate an oncology cycle visit A, it is the case that the visit A is initialized

reserve_appointment_slot.description: reserve an appointment slot B for an oncology cycle visit A
preconditions: I can only reserve an appointment slot B for an oncology cycle visit A if it is the case that the visit A is initialized and B is available and A is compatible with B
I can only reserve an appointment slot B for an oncology cycle visit A if it is not the case that the visit A has an allocated slot
effects: Once I reserve an appointment slot B for an oncology cycle visit A, it is the case that the visit A has a reservation for the appointment slot B and the visit A has an allocated slot
Once I reserve an appointment slot B for an oncology cycle visit A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_appointment_slot.description: release an appointment slot B from an oncology cycle visit A
preconditions: I can only release an appointment slot B from an oncology cycle visit A if it is the case that the visit A has a reservation for the appointment slot B

I can only release an appointment slot B from an oncology cycle visit A if it is not the case that the visit treatment for A was performed and it is not the case that the visit staff for A was confirmed
effects: Once I release an appointment slot B from an oncology cycle visit A, it is the case that B is available

Once I release an appointment slot B from an oncology cycle visit A, it is not the case anymore that the visit A has a reservation for the appointment slot B and it is not the case anymore that the visit A has an allocated slot and it is not the case anymore that the visit A has a confirmed room and it is not the case anymore that the resources for visit A are ready and it is not the case anymore that A has a logistics service in use and it is not the case anymore that A includes a visit for post treatment processing and it is not the case anymore that A requires post processing

allocate_treatment_room.description: allocate a treatment room B to an oncology cycle visit A
preconditions: I can only allocate a treatment room B to an oncology cycle visit A if it is the case that the visit A is initialized and B is available
effects: Once I allocate a treatment room B to an oncology cycle visit A, it is the case that A has been allocated to the treatment room B
Once I allocate a treatment room B to an oncology cycle visit A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_treatment_room.description: release a treatment room B from an oncology cycle visit A
preconditions: I can only release a treatment room B from an oncology cycle visit A if it is the case that A has been allocated to the treatment room B
effects: Once I release a treatment room B from an oncology cycle visit A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a treatment room B from an oncology cycle visit A, it is not the case anymore that A has been allocated to the treatment room B

predicate_nl_templates.visit_room_confirmed: the visit {?oncology_cycle_visit} has a confirmed room
predicate_nl_templates.visit_resources_ready: the resources for visit {?oncology_cycle_visit} are ready

predicate_nl_templates.visit_clinician_assigned: the clinician {?clinician} is assigned to visit {?oncology_cycle_visit}

predicate_nl_templates.visit_room_allocated: {?oncology_cycle_visit} has been allocated to the treatment room {?treatment_room}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a oncology cycle visit or a appointment slot or a session type or a clinician or a infusion pump or a ancillary device or a treatment room or a logistics service or a time block or a registered nurse or a laboratory slot or a medication batch or a care unit is also a object
Everything that is a infusion nurse team or a pharmacy team is also a care unit
Everything that is a initial cycle visit or a followup cycle visit is also a oncology cycle visit
